title: Doflamingo Taunts the Captive Law
description: Pages 6–10 focus on doflamingo taunts the captive law, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the active characters in this part.
scene: This part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7 as luffy reaches Law again, but Doflamingo and Bellamy stand between the alliance and the final confrontation.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Oh, no, not at all! Oh my, no need!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: But, that thing...was that his lower half!? The hell's going on!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Does this mean that we might have actually taken down the big boss!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: He probably sent it just to mock us...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Ah! That reminds me! That Kelly Funk bastard!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: What simpletons! They fell for it, hook, line, and sinker!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: After realizing that, we tried to stop him, but outta nowhere...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: That assassin, Kelly, just got erased in an instant!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: If we're not careful, there's no telling when we'll get snuck up on by the enemy!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: We were actually saved by that guy! Even though he made us look like idiots!

dialogue.speaker: Cavendish
dialogue.text: What's going on outside!? What Hap- penned to cabbage and the others!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: We've completely been left behind. Everyone else is already on the second level!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: And here we were thinking we'd be taking a shortcut to the sunflower fields!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: Kyros: arrives on the first level

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: Kya! Not a single one of them have been eliminated by the troops on the first level!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: Yer shitty under-lings ain't no match for us!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Straw hat still hasn't shown up!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #26
dialogue.text: Let's start getting rid of these fodder, one at a time!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #32
dialogue.text: You guys! Take care of UCY!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #33
dialogue.text: He actually turned it in- to a secret passage!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #34
dialogue.text: Some new force has made quite the ruckus!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #35
dialogue.text: WH- WHAT!? So there's more of them!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #36
dialogue.text: You fools! Are you going to allow your enemies to escape your sight!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #39
dialogue.text: We, Chin- Jao, shall press on to the 3rd level!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #45
dialogue.text: Mingo! I'm coming for you, you bas- Tard!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #50
dialogue.text: There's no way humans can fly on Stag beetles!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #51
dialogue.text: Let's just run to the city!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #54
dialogue.text: You aren't listening, are ya, lil' squirt!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #55
dialogue.text: This is the tAL jumping service! Big people are heavy so they cannot fly on it!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #57
dialogue.text: We do not have much time!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #60
dialogue.text: Didn't you just say we can't fly!?

summary: Doflamingo Taunts the Captive Law develops the chapter's Dressrosa conflict through Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, while preserving the OCR dialogue and keeping unclear speakers readable.
